summary: Iteration 16 Testing Complete - OTP Email Verification + Admin Contact endpoint fully tested. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend: Full OTP registration flow verified (form → send OTP → dev code displayed in amber box → enter code → account created → redirect to /profil). ProcedureDetailPage correctly loads admin contact via /api/admin/contact and uses adminContact.id as ChatPanel recipient. Admin can see procedure conversations. All features working correctly.

issues: Minor UX: Submit button is disabled when otp.length < 6 even though devOtp is already set and would be used automatically. User must still type the code from the amber box manually. Behavior is technically correct but could be improved to auto-enable when devOtp is present.

backend: GET /api/admin/contact → returns correct admin ID acc21120-fe47-4e5f-a910-10dab816f9cb
POST /api/auth/send-otp with valid fresh email → 200 with dev_otp (6 digits)
POST /api/auth/register without otp field → 422 (Pydantic required field)
POST /api/auth/register with correct OTP → 200 + token + user object
POST /api/auth/register for email with no OTP sent → 400
POST /api/auth/register already registered email → send-otp returns 400
POST /api/conversations with admin ID (procedures type) using query params → 200
Conversation response has id, type, participant_ids with admin ID correct
frontend_ui: Email/Phone toggle buttons present and functional
Phone toggle shows phone input + fallback email input
Email toggle shows only email input
Form: username, email, password, confirmPassword, role buttons all present
Clicking 'Envoyer le code de vérification' calls /api/auth/send-otp and shows OTP form (step 2)
Dev mode amber box shows 6-digit code with 'Mode développement — Code de test:' label
OTP input field autoFocused in step 2
Entering correct code + clicking 'Valider et créer mon compte' → account created, redirect to /profil
'Compte créé avec succès !' toast shown after successful registration
ProcedureDetailPage loads correctly with procedure content
'Poser une question' button visible for logged-in non-author users
Clicking 'Poser une question' opens ChatPanel with admin (MATRIX224) as recipient
ChatPanel shows 'Début de la conversation' + input field
Admin can see 2 procedure conversations in GET /api/conversations?type=procedures

mocked_apis.Resend Email Service: MOCKED - No RESEND_API_KEY configured. OTP returned directly in API response as dev_otp field. UI displays it in amber box.

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: Line 108 `otp_code = getattr(data, 'otp', None)` is redundant since otp is a required Pydantic field - if missing, 422 is raised before this code. Not harmful, just redundant.

LoginPage.js: Minor UX inconsistency - submit button disabled when `otp.length < 6` even if `devOtp` is set. Since `codeToVerify = devOtp || otp`, the devOtp would be used automatically. Consider: `disabled={loading || (!devOtp && otp.length < 6)}` to auto-enable button in dev mode.
admin.py: GET /api/admin/contact uses `find_one({'role': 'admin'})` - works correctly if there is only one admin. Works as intended.

test_otp_user_created_during_testing.note: Created during frontend UI testing to verify full OTP flow

seed_data_creation: Created test user 'uitest_noz4sd' (test_otp_noz4sd@example.com) via full OTP registration flow test. Created procedure conversations during backend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 fixes validated: (1) GET /api/admin/contact returns correct admin {id, username} without auth. (2) Full OTP registration flow works: send-otp → dev_otp in response → UI shows it in amber box → user types it → register creates account. (3) ProcedureDetailPage uses adminContact.id (acc21120-...) as ChatPanel recipient. Admin (matrixguinea@gmail.com / strongpassword123 / ID: acc21120-fe47-4e5f-a910-10dab816f9cb) sees 2 procedure conversations. Email service MOCKED - dev_otp returned in API response. All 18 backend tests pass. All UI flows pass.

rca_of_issues.messaging_procedures_fix: Root cause: procedures were pointing to an old admin account ID. Fix: DB updated + GET /api/admin/contact endpoint returns current admin. ProcedureDetailPage now fetches admin contact on mount and uses adminContact.id as ChatPanel recipient, falling back to procedure.author_id if fetch fails.
rca_of_issues.otp_registration: New feature: registration now requires OTP verification. send-otp endpoint generates 6-digit code, stores in otp_codes collection with 5-min expiry. Register endpoint verifies OTP before creating account. Dev mode (no RESEND_API_KEY): OTP returned in API response as dev_otp. UI displays code in amber box for testing.
